comment.text: Checkbox label in the portal security settings indicating that the setting applies to the specified rooms and their shared content. The {{rooms}} variable represents the term for rooms.

usage.context:
<div>
 <Checkbox
 dataTestId="applies_to_rooms_checkbox"
 isChecked={applyToRooms}
 onChange={() => setApplyToRooms(!applyToRooms)}
 label={t("Settings:AppliesToRooms", {
 rooms: t("Common:Rooms"),
 })}
 />
 <div
 className={`category-item-description ${styles.checkboxDescription}`}
